title: Cappy Tornitos Chile Toreado Chicken and Tornitos Bowl
ingredients: 2 cups of Cappy Tornitos Chile Toreado chips
2 cups cooked chicken breast, cut into strips
instructions: Step 1. In a bowl, mix the yogurt with lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper until you get a smooth and creamy sauce.
Step 2. In each bowl, place a base layer of Cappy Tornitos Chile Toreado chips.
Step 3. Distribute the hot chicken on top.
Step 4. Add the avocado and cucumber.
Step 5. Finish by drizzling with the yogurt sauce and serve immediately to keep the Tornitos crunchy.
description: A fresh and crunchy bowl with chicken, avocado, cucumber, and a base of Cappy Tornitos Chile Toreado chips, all topped with a creamy yogurt sauce. Perfect for eating with a spoon or with your hands.
